approvalPolicy: Candidates are research/staging records only. Do not download, import, replace, or activate a candidate unless source approval and visual approval are both recorded and the import/replace script is run with --approved <key>.

demandSources.name: Kelley Blue Book / Cox Automotive best-selling cars, trucks, and SUVs coverage
demandSources.notes: Use as a current U.S. sales-demand cross-check before approving the final active hero list.

demandSources.name: Edmunds best-selling cars, trucks, and SUVs coverage
demandSources.notes: Use as an independent model-demand check for mainstream shopper vehicles.

demandSources.name: GoodCarBadCar U.S. model sales tables
demandSources.notes: Use only for demand ranking; do not source imagery from this site.

demandRationale: Compact SUVs and hybrid trims are core U.S. shopper segments for a general car-advice landing page.
RAV4 is consistently represented in mainstream best-seller lists, making it a high-recognition hero candidate.

sourceCandidates.label: Toyota Pressroom direct image — 2026 Toyota RAV4 PHEV GR Sport studio
sourceCandidates.notes: Verified by HEAD as image/jpeg. This is a Toyota official RAV4 PHEV/GR Sport studio image; approve only if PHEV/GR Sport is acceptable for the RAV4 Hybrid slot. Exact 2026 HEV images on Toyota S3 require referer-gated access, so this pressroom-hosted direct JPG is the automation-friendly source.

sourceCandidates.label: Toyota USA Newsroom / RAV4 media images
sourceCandidates.notes: Use only an official Toyota media/press image with clear reuse terms; avoid dealer inventory photos.

demandRationale: CR-V is a mainstream compact SUV that overlaps strongly with practical used/new-car shoppers.
Hybrid positioning complements CarAdvisor's evidence-over-hype buyer message.

sourceCandidates.label: Honda News direct image — 2026 Honda CR-V Sport Touring Hybrid exterior option 18
sourceCandidates.notes: Switched from cargo/interior option 27 to exterior option 18 after cutout QA; official Honda News/Wieck media asset, HEAD 200 image/jpeg.

sourceCandidates.label: Honda News direct image — 2026 Honda CR-V Sport Touring Hybrid
sourceCandidates.notes: Verified by HEAD as image/jpeg. Official Honda News/Wieck media asset, preview-sized 928x522; adequate for an ~800px hero source after cutout if visual quality passes.

sourceCandidates.label: Honda Newsroom CR-V images
sourceCandidates.notes: Prefer clean side or front-three-quarter media cutouts from Honda Newsroom.

demandRationale: Civic keeps the active rotation from skewing only SUV/truck and represents budget-conscious mainstream buyers.
The model has strong recognition in new and used shopping flows.

sourceCandidates.label: Honda News direct image — 2026 Honda Civic Hybrid
sourceCandidates.notes: Verified by HEAD as image/jpeg. Official Honda News/Wieck media asset, preview-sized 928x522; adequate for an ~800px hero source after cutout if visual quality passes.

sourceCandidates.label: Honda Newsroom Civic images
sourceCandidates.notes: Prefer an official media image with no watermark or dealer plate.

demandRationale: Forester broadens the rotation to safety/all-weather shoppers and practical family buyers.
It visually complements compact SUV candidates while adding brand variety.

sourceCandidates.label: Subaru Media direct image — Subaru Forester Wilderness Hybrid exterior teaser
sourceCandidates.notes: Switched from motion road image to full exterior Wilderness Hybrid image after cutout QA; official Subaru U.S. Media Center asset.

sourceCandidates.label: Subaru Media direct image — 2026 Subaru Forester Hybrid teaser
sourceCandidates.notes: Verified by HEAD as image/jpeg. Official Subaru U.S. Media Center asset referenced by the 2026 Forester pricing/Hybrid media page.

sourceCandidates.label: Subaru U.S. Media Center Forester images
sourceCandidates.notes: Use only official Subaru media assets with reuse permission.

demandRationale: Model Y covers the high-intent EV/crossover segment and is highly recognizable to current shoppers.
Including one EV candidate makes the hero rotation feel current without over-indexing on EVs.

sourceCandidates.label: Tesla official CDN direct image — Model Y homepage exterior
sourceCandidates.notes: Switched from moving road side-profile to cleaner blue exterior homepage image after cutout QA; official Tesla digital asset, HEAD 200 image/jpeg.

sourceCandidates.label: Tesla official CDN direct image — Model Y main hero
sourceCandidates.notes: Verified by HEAD as image/jpeg. Official Tesla digital asset URL; Tesla public pages/presskit may return 403 from WSL, but this direct asset is reachable.

sourceCandidates.label: Tesla official press/media resources
sourceCandidates.notes: Verify media permissions and avoid owner/dealer photos.

demandRationale: Tacoma adds a truck silhouette without dominating the rotation with full-size pickup scale.
It is a practical alternative to F-150 if visual consistency with compact SUVs is the top priority.

sourceCandidates.label: Toyota Pressroom direct image — 2026 Toyota Tacoma Limited exterior option 012
sourceCandidates.notes: Switched from option 001 with foreground obstruction to cleaner full exterior option 012 after cutout QA; official Toyota Pressroom source.

sourceCandidates.label: Toyota Pressroom direct image — 2026 Toyota Tacoma Limited
sourceCandidates.notes: Verified by HEAD as image/jpeg. Large official Toyota Pressroom source; likely needs downscaling/background removal before staging.

sourceCandidates.label: Toyota USA Newsroom / Tacoma media images
sourceCandidates.notes: Use a side or clean front-three-quarter studio/press image.

demandRationale: F-Series demand is large, but the full-size truck silhouette may be harder to scale consistently with the current hero family.
Use as the truck candidate if demand recognition is valued more than visual compactness.

sourceCandidates.label: Ford official asset — 2026 Ford F-150 XLT Chrome Package Argon Blue
sourceCandidates.notes: Switched from low-contrast silver Lariat source to higher-contrast blue XLT source after cutout QA; official Ford assets CDN, HEAD 200 image/jpeg.

sourceCandidates.label: Ford official asset — 2026 Ford F-150 Lariat Black Appearance Package
sourceCandidates.notes: Verified by HEAD as image/jpeg from Ford official assets CDN. URL path ends .webp while response is image/jpeg, so it will need conversion/background removal before process-cutout can use a PNG.

sourceCandidates.label: Ford Media Center F-150 images
sourceCandidates.notes: Avoid dealer/marketplace truck photos; verify official media terms.

demandRationale: Refresh the current 4Runner in the same pipeline so the active set does not mix old and new styles.

sourceCandidates.label: Toyota Pressroom direct image — 2026 Toyota 4Runner TRD Sport exterior
sourceCandidates.notes: HEAD verified 200 image/jpeg, content-length 1,026,017 bytes. Cleaner mainstream 4Runner trim candidate; likely the best first replacement source if visual consistency beats rugged accessory detail. Selected for first-pass v2 staging after user source approval; live replacement still requires separate visual/replacement approval.

sourceCandidates.label: Toyota Pressroom direct image — 2026 Toyota 4Runner TRD Off-Road exterior
sourceCandidates.notes: HEAD verified 200 image/jpeg, content-length 1,584,454 bytes. Strong trail-SUV replacement candidate that matches the current runner slot/tag.

sourceCandidates.label: Toyota Pressroom direct image — 2026 Toyota 4Runner Trailhunter exterior
sourceCandidates.notes: HEAD verified 200 image/jpeg, content-length 1,739,952 bytes. More rugged/overlanding variant; visually useful backup but roof/accessory detail may be harder to normalize into a clean studio-like family.

sourceCandidates.label: Toyota USA Newsroom / 4Runner vehicle media page
sourceCandidates.notes: Official Toyota 4Runner media page containing additional 2026 source options; direct URLs above are preferred first-pass candidates.

demandRationale: Refresh the current Camry with a photo-real cutout that matches any newly added candidates.

sourceCandidates.label: Toyota Pressroom direct image — 2026 Toyota Camry exterior hero
sourceCandidates.notes: HEAD verified 200 image/jpeg, content-length 3,517,308 bytes. Best first-pass Camry replacement candidate because it is a high-resolution official 2026 Camry exterior from the vehicle media page. Selected for first-pass v2 staging after user source approval; live replacement still requires separate visual/replacement approval.

sourceCandidates.label: Toyota Pressroom direct image — 2026 Toyota Camry XSE AWD Heavy Metal / Black Roof
sourceCandidates.notes: HEAD verified 200 image/jpeg, content-length 1,092,743 bytes. Sportier trim/color option; good alternate if the primary angle/background does not cut out cleanly.

sourceCandidates.label: Toyota Pressroom direct image — 2026 Toyota Camry SE AWD Supersonic Red
sourceCandidates.notes: HEAD verified 200 image/jpeg, content-length 1,090,227 bytes. Higher-saturation alternate that may read well on the dark/gold hero background if cutout edges are clean.

sourceCandidates.label: Toyota USA Newsroom / Camry vehicle media page
sourceCandidates.notes: Official Toyota Camry media page containing additional 2026 source options; direct URLs above are preferred first-pass candidates.

demandRationale: Refresh the current CX-5 to keep scale, contrast, and ground alignment consistent with the proposed SUV additions.

sourceCandidates.label: Mazda USA Newsroom direct image — 2026 Mazda CX-5 Navy Blue Mica
sourceCandidates.notes: HEAD verified 200 image/jpeg, content-length 110,026 bytes. Official Mazda newsroom/PRNewswire-hosted 2026 CX-5 pricing image; likely smaller than Toyota sources but may be clean enough for an 800px hero cutout. Selected for second-pass v2 staging after the higher-resolution reveal source produced background-removal artifacts. Second-pass staged cutout was held because the source included a visible person/open door, inconsistent with vehicle-only hero assets.

sourceCandidates.label: Mazda USA Newsroom direct image — all-new 2026 Mazda CX-5 reveal
sourceCandidates.notes: HEAD verified 200 image/jpeg, content-length 2,672,866 bytes. Strong high-resolution 2026 CX-5 source; recommended as the first fallback or primary if the Navy Blue image is too small for clean processing. Selected for first-pass v2 staging after user source approval; live replacement still requires separate visual/replacement approval. First-pass staged cutout was held due to visible background-removal artifacts in the review sheet.

sourceCandidates.label: Mazda USA Newsroom direct image — 2025 Mazda CX-5 pricing fallback
sourceCandidates.notes: HEAD verified 200 image/jpeg, content-length 447,141 bytes. Official 2025 fallback if 2026 all-new shots do not match the desired hero angle/crop. Selected for third-pass v2 staging after prior 2026 options produced background artifacts or included a person/open-door scene.

sourceCandidates.label: Mazda USA Newsroom / CX-5 news releases search
sourceCandidates.notes: Official Mazda newsroom search page with CX-5 releases and media assets; direct URLs above are preferred first-pass candidates.

demandRationale: Refresh the current Accord with the same cutout treatment as any approved new Civic/CR-V candidates.

sourceCandidates.label: Honda News direct image — 2026 Honda Accord Sport-L Hybrid exterior
sourceCandidates.notes: HEAD verified 200 image/jpeg, content-length 74,090 bytes. Official Honda News/Wieck 2026 Accord Sport-L Hybrid preview; good first-pass Accord replacement source if preview resolution is sufficient. Selected for first-pass v2 staging after user source approval; live replacement still requires separate visual/replacement approval. First-pass staged cutout needs cleanup around lower wheel/ground contact before visual approval.

sourceCandidates.label: Honda News direct image — 2026 Honda Accord SE exterior
sourceCandidates.notes: HEAD verified 200 image/jpeg, content-length 86,784 bytes. Official Honda News/Wieck 2026 Accord SE preview; useful alternate if it has cleaner silhouette/edge separation. Selected for second-pass v2 staging after Sport-L Hybrid cutout showed lower-edge/wheel cleanup concerns.

sourceCandidates.label: Honda News direct image — 2026 Honda Accord SE wheel/exterior detail fallback
sourceCandidates.notes: HEAD verified 200 image/jpeg, content-length 46,470 bytes. Official Honda News/Wieck fallback; likely less ideal for full-vehicle hero use if it is primarily a wheel/detail angle.

sourceCandidates.label: Honda Newsroom / Accord channel
sourceCandidates.notes: Official Honda Accord channel; Honda pages may return 403 to direct WSL user agents, but direct Wieck preview images above were HEAD verified.
